purpose: Live freshness check for recurring BDBV 2026 sources. This report does not mutate released snapshots; rows with needs_review=true should be archived through the manifest before a scored refresh.

dashboard_aggregate.basis: Sum of dashboard per-bulletin health-zone rows across all reports returned by the GraphQL payload. The dashboard UI states the chart uses cases reported for that bulletin only, not cumulative rows per bulletin.
